title: S. O. 381(E): amending the notification dated S.O. 350(E)
description: S. O. 381(E): amending the notification dated S.O. 350(E)
text: REGD. NO. D. L.-33004/99 The Gazette of India EXTRAORDINARY PAST II—Section 3—Sub-section (ii) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 279] NEW DELHI, THURSDAY, MAY 3,2001/VAISAKHA13,1923 MINISTRYOF ENVIRONMENT AND FORESTS ORDER New Delhi, the 30th April, 2001 S. O. 381(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-sections (1) and (3) of Section 3 of the Environ- ment (Protection) Act 1986 (29 of 1986), the Central Gov- ernment hereby makes the following amendment in the Order of the Government of India in the Ministry of Envi- ronment and Forests number S.O.35O(E), dated 17th May, 1999, namely :— In the said Order, in paragraph I, for the words "for a period of two years with effect from the date of publica- tion of this notification", the words "for a period of four years with effect from the date of publication of this Order"shall be substituted. [File No. Z-20018/1/99-CPA] VIJAI SHARMA, Jt Secy. Note:—The principal order was published in the Gazette of India vide number S. O.35O(E), dated 17thMay, 1999. 1326 GI/2001 Printed by the Manager. Govt. of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 1 of 2 -- -- 2 of 2 --
